name: Safari Cannon
short_description: Explore the wilds of the African Safari and discover all the wild beasts of the savannah. From elephants to monkeys, you'll encounter a host of creatures who will try to stop you. It's a fun game for the whole family - so come on, join the adventure!
detailed_description:
Get ready to experience the thrill of the African Safari like never before!
As you shoot across the savannah, you'll discover all the incredible beasts that call this wild land home.
From majestic elephants to playful monkeys, you'll encounter a whole host of wild creatures who will do their best to stop you. It's a fun and wholesome game that's perfect for the whole family - you'll be in stitches as you dodge, bounce, and avoid all the wild creatures who will do their best to stop you.

It's a pickup and play game that will keep you entertained for hours - so come on, join the adventure and explore the wilds of the African Safari!"
